Command.Name: login
Command.Description: Log in to Bella Baxter (browser OAuth2 or API key).

Command.Name: logout
Command.Description: Log out and clear stored credentials.

Command.Name: list
Command.Description: List all orgs you belong to.

Argument.Name: slug-or-id
Argument.Description: The org slug or ID to switch to

Command.Name: refresh
Command.Description: Manually refresh the OAuth2 access token.

Option.Description: Filter projects by tag
Add a tag (can be specified multiple times)
Add a tag (can be specified multiple times)
Remove a tag (can be specified multiple times)
Replace all tags with a comma-separated list (use empty string to clear all)

Command.Name: generate
Command.Description: Generate typed secrets code for dotnet, python, go, typescript, dart, php, ruby, or swift.

Option.Description: Generate a bella-secrets.ts TypeScript module augmentation file for @bella-baxter/config SDK (enables app.bella.DATABASE_URL typed property access). Exports BELLA_COERCIONS for runtime type coercion.

Command.Name: totp
Command.Description: Manage TOTP/2FA keys stored in environments.

Command.Name: list
Command.Description: List TOTP keys in an environment.

Command.Name: code
Command.Description: Get the current TOTP code for a key.

Command.Name: import
Command.Description: Import a TOTP key from an otpauth:// URL.

Command.Name: set-server
Command.Description: Set the Bella Baxter API server URL.

Argument.Name: url
Argument.Description: The Bella Baxter API server URL (e.g. https://api.my-instance.com)

Command.Name: generate
Command.Description: Generate a cryptographically secure random password or passphrase.

Option.Description: Exclude ambiguous characters (0, O, 1, l, I)
Password length (default: 20, range: 8-128)
Generate a memorable passphrase instead of a random password
Exclude numbers
Exclude symbols
Exclude uppercase letters
Output only the value (no labels, for piping to clipboard etc.)
Passphrase separator: hyphens|spaces|periods|commas|underscores (default: hyphens)
Number of words for passphrase (default: 5, range: 3-8)

Command.Name: run
Command.Description: Inject Bella secrets as env vars and run a command.

Argument.Name: cmd...
Argument.Description: Command and arguments to run (prefix with --)

Option.Description: Application name injected as BELLA_BAXTER_APP_CLIENT (useful for audit logs)
Environment slug or ID
Polling interval in seconds for --watch (default: 30)
Project slug or ID
Provider name to use (if environment has multiple)
How to reload on change: restart (default) or sighup
Watch for secret changes and reload the process

Command.Name: pull
Command.Description: Download all secrets and write to a file (default: .env). Shorthand for 'bella secrets get -o .env'.

Command.Name: exec
Command.Description: Inject Bella connection credentials (API key + URL) and run a command. The subprocess uses the Bella SDK to discover its project/environment context from the API key.

Argument.Name: cmd...
Argument.Description: Command and arguments to run (prefix with --)

Option.Description: Application name injected as BELLA_BAXTER_APP_CLIENT (useful for audit logs)
Environment slug — used for workload identity (GitHub Actions / Kubernetes)
Project slug — used for workload identity (GitHub Actions / Kubernetes)

Command.Name: issue
Command.Description: Issue a short-lived scoped API token for a specific environment.

Option.Description: Environment slug. Falls back to context (.bella file / BELLA_BAXTER_ENV env var)
Output format: token (default, just the token string) or json (full response)
Project slug. Falls back to context (.bella file / BELLA_BAXTER_PROJECT env var)
Human-readable reason / client name for audit purposes
Required. Comma-separated list of scope names (e.g. stripe,payment)
Token lifetime in minutes (default: 15, max: 480)

Command.Name: env
Command.Description: Output eval-able export statements for BELLA_BAXTER_PROJECT, BELLA_BAXTER_ENV (and legacy BELLA_PROJECT/BELLA_ENV aliases). Usage: eval $(bella env)

Argument.Name: context
Argument.Description: Optional context override: <project>/<env>. Falls back to .bella file / global default.

Option.Description: Output as JSON (key-value pairs, for scripting).
Shell syntax: bash (default), fish, powershell
Output unset/Remove-Item statements to clear all Bella vars.

Command.Name: upgrade
Command.Description: Upgrade bella to the latest version.

Option.Description: Only check for updates, do not install
Install a specific version (e.g. 1.2.3)

Command.Name: init
Command.Description: Create a .bella context file in the current directory (shortcut for 'bella context init').

Command.Name: context
Command.Description: Directory-aware Bella project/environment context (for shell prompts).

Command.Name: get
Command.Description: Output current project/environment (for use in shell prompts).

Option.Description: Output context as JSON
Suppress all error output (for prompt use)

Command.Name: show
Command.Description: Show active context with source information.

Command.Name: init
Command.Description: Create a .bella file in the current directory (like git init).

Command.Name: clear
Command.Description: Remove the .bella file from the current directory.

Command.Name: use
Command.Description: Set an ephemeral session context (no file written). Requires shell function from 'bella shell init'.

Argument.Name: context
Argument.Description: Context in the form <project>/<env>, or empty to clear. Example: camino/dev

Option.Description: Shell syntax for output: bash (default), fish, powershell

Command.Name: init
Command.Description: Output shell integration snippet for your prompt framework.

Argument.Name: shell
Argument.Description: Shell or prompt framework: bash, zsh, oh-my-zsh, powerlevel10k, oh-my-posh, starship, fish, powershell

Command.Name: open
Command.Description: Spawn an interactive subshell with BELLA_API_KEY, BELLA_PROJECT, BELLA_ENV pre-set.

Argument.Name: context
Argument.Description: Optional context override: <project>/<env>. Falls back to .bella file / global default.

Option.Description: Shell to spawn (default: $SHELL on Unix, cmd.exe on Windows). Example: /bin/bash, zsh, powershell

Command.Name: mcp
Command.Description: Start the Bella Baxter MCP server (stdio) for Claude Desktop / VS Code Copilot.

Option.Description: Override Bella API base URL.
Print Claude Desktop and VS Code MCP config snippets then exit.

Command.Name: ssh
Command.Description: Manage SSH certificates via Vault SSH CA.

Command.Name: configure
Command.Description: Configure SSH CA for an environment (admin only).

Command.Name: ca-key
Command.Description: Show the SSH CA public key (for sshd_config setup).

Command.Name: list
Command.Description: List SSH roles for an environment.

Option.Description: Comma-separated allowed users (e.g. ec2-user,ubuntu)
Default certificate TTL (e.g. 8h)
Max certificate TTL (e.g. 24h)

Command.Name: sign
Command.Description: Sign your SSH public key and write the certificate.

Option.Description: Path to SSH public key file (default: ~/.ssh/id_ed25519.pub or id_rsa.pub)
Comma-separated valid principals
Certificate TTL (e.g. 1h)

Command.Name: connect
Command.Description: Sign key (if needed) and open an SSH connection.

Option.Description: Path to SSH private key (without .pub). Default: ~/.ssh/id_ed25519 or id_rsa

Command.Name: agent
Command.Description: Long-running sidecar: polls secrets, writes sinks, signals your process.

Option.Description: Path to agent config file (default: bella-agent.yaml)
Scaffold a starter bella-agent.yaml in the current directory
